Business Name: Comfort Inn & Suites Wildwood - The Villages
Description: Hotel near I-75 Exit 329 / Florida Turnpike, Wildwood, offering limited tractor-trailer parking and dedicated spaces for RVs, buses and trucks.

Business Name: Marion County Truck Comfort / Weigh Station (I-75 MM 338)
Description: FDOT truck comfort/inspection station on I-75 at Mile Marker 338 (both directions) - northbound 2 mi north of SR 44 (Exit 329) and southbound 2 mi south of CR 484 (Exit 341). Functions as a commercial vehicle weigh/inspection site and accepts PrePass.

Major 24-hour Petro (TravelCenters of America) at I-75 Exit 368 (CR 318) with roughly 270 truck parking spaces (about 30 reserved and 30 paid), 14 shower stalls, a certified CAT scale, an Iron Skillet restaurant plus Wendy's, laundry, barber shop, drivers' lounge and a 5-bay TA Truck Service shop offering repairs and tire service.

24-hour TA (TravelCenters of America) travel center at I-75 Exit 414 (US 441) with roughly 150 truck parking spaces, 9 fuel lanes, 13 showers, a certified CAT scale, restaurant/deli, laundry, barber shop, ATM and a 5-bay TA Truck Service shop (PM, diagnostics, alignments, tire and oil service).

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 414 (US 441) with about 106 truck parking spaces, 9 DEF lanes, 7 showers, a certified CAT scale, laundry facilities, dog park, propane exchange and premium Wi-Fi.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 451 with about 125 truck parking spaces, 10 fuel lanes, 7 showers, a certified CAT scale, an Arby's, DEF, propane and a Love's Truck Care area with tire service.

24-hour Pilot travel center at I-75 Exit 460 (SR 6) with about 90 truck parking spaces (5 reserved, 5 paid), 10 fuel lanes, 9 showers, a certified CAT scale, bulk DEF, laundry, deli, ATM, Subway and Cinnabon, and a drivers' lounge. Northernmost major chain truck stop before the Georgia line.

Florida Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services (FDACS) agricultural inspection station on I-75 southbound in Hamilton County near White Springs, inspecting commercial vehicles and agricultural shipments entering Florida from Georgia.

Florida I-75 truck weigh station in Hamilton County near White Springs (approx. 2.5 miles south of Exit 451 / US 129), operating weigh-in-motion with PrePass and reported as bidirectional (separate northbound and southbound facilities).
CAT certified truck scale at the Flying J Travel Center (#631), I-75 Exit 2 in Miami-Dade. Weigh-and-print certified scale co-located with the travel center.

Reservable truck/trailer parking lot in downtown Ocala near US-301, marketed as having access to the I-75 freight network.

Business Name: Days Inn by Wyndham Wildwood I-75
Description: Hotel off I-75 near the Florida Turnpike and SR 44 (Exit 329 area) in Wildwood, with a designated semi-truck area and ample free large-vehicle parking.
TA Truck Service center at TA Lake City, I-75 Exit 414. Five service bays open 24/7/365 offering tire service, PM, engine diagnostics, alignments, oil changes and standard repairs.
TA/Petro truck service center at Petro Ocala (#323), I-75 Exit 368 / Hwy 318. Five bays with tire service, alignments, DOT inspections, brake, HVAC and diagnostics.
Speedco truck lube and tire service at I-75 Exit 414, Lake City, co-located with Love's Travel Stop #724. Oil change/PM, light mechanical, tire service and emergency roadside assistance.

Description: Southern Tire Mart at Pilot #385 in Ocala at the I-75 Exit 358 / Hwy 326 interchange. Commercial truck tires, service and 24/7 roadside assistance.
Independent heavy-duty truck repair and wrecker/towing service in Wildwood, near the I-75 Exit 329 / SR 44 corridor.
